/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_custom_action_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmy_custom_action_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/my_custom_action_interface__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/my_custom_action_interface/action/counter__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/alex/workspace/ros2_project/for_learn/my_custom_action_interface/build/my_custom_action_interface:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmy_custom_action_interface__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libaction_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
